changeSet.author: Sam Plackett
changeSet.sql:
WITH DuplicateGroups AS ( SELECT "paymentReference", "paymentPeriod", "paymentAmount", "transactionDate", COUNT(*) AS duplicate_count FROM public.d365 GROUP BY "paymentReference", "paymentPeriod", "paymentAmount", "transactionDate" HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 )
DELETE FROM public.d365 d USING DuplicateGroups dg WHERE d."paymentReference" = dg."paymentReference" AND d."paymentPeriod" = dg."paymentPeriod" AND d."paymentAmount" = dg."paymentAmount" AND d."transactionDate" = dg."transactionDate" AND d."startPublish" IS NULL;
